name: sdl_term
summary: SDL2 terminal emulator — embed a VT100-compatible terminal in any SDL window.
use_when: User wants a terminal/REPL embedded inside an SDL graphical window
User says 'SDL terminal', 'graphical terminal', 'embed terminal in SDL'
User wants to display subprocess output in an SDL window
avoid_when: User wants a standalone terminal app (use ncurses instead)
User only needs text output without SDL
